cases.expectation: ApprovalReviewStage freezes commit posture and points to replacement authority.
ApprovalAuthoritySummary exposes the replacement authority ref instead of a live-looking submit path.
Queue scanner stays suppressed and the urgent command surface becomes the dominant review plane.
UrgentContactTimeline shows attempts, actor, recency, and outcome without digging through a generic audit feed.
Returned-to-triage posture preserves the last urgent outcome and reopen explanation in the same stage.
The route preserves the last safe escalation summary and fences mutation under recovery-only posture.
